title: Fallback Graph Extractor wrapper
context: Requirement to prioritize fast cloud LLM extraction while maintaining local Ollama as a reliable fallback
content: Implement a FallbackExtractor that satisfies the worker.GraphExtractor interface. It holds two implementations (primary and secondary). The ExtractEntities method attempts the primary implementation first; if it is unconfigured (nil) or fails with an error, it silently falls back to the secondary implementation, logging only to stderr for diagnostics.
